name: The Vigilants
history: The Vigilants formed organically in November 1976 when Tess Winters (Astrid Stormbringer) and Ram Pau (Counter-Strike) independently responded to the same jewelry store robbery during a Lower Manhattan blackout. Their effective improvised teamwork led Counter-Strike to suggest they exchange contact information. Two nights later they fought side-by-side again against Whiplash, Boomerang, and A.I.M. agents at ESU. By mid-January 1977 the roster had grown to include Screamwave, Wartorn, Psyren, and Crosswise.

rooms.name: Hypnoporter Chamber
rooms.notes: Plot-level teleport/transport. Fixed-Rank Teleportation/Gateway accessible from base only.

rooms.name: Laboratory
rooms.notes: Scales, sinks, chemicals, microscope. +1CS on Scientific/Earth/Life Sciences FEATs.

rooms.name: Communications Room
rooms.notes: Short-wave monitor, police band, computer network tap-in.

rooms.name: Electronics Lab
rooms.notes: Lathes, drills, precision tools. Enhanced Reason FEATs for Electronics/Repair/Engineering.

rooms.name: Crime Files Room
rooms.notes: Remarkable-ability database. Cross-references M.O.s, villains, locations.

rooms.name: Gym
rooms.notes: +1CS on one physical FEAT per session with downtime training.

rooms.name: Garage
rooms.notes: Vehicle service and repair. Supports Reason/Repair FEATs for vehicle mods.

rooms.name: Meeting Room
rooms.notes: Large table + 10 chairs. Supports Popularity FEATs and Leadership actions.

rooms.name: Kitchen / Common Area
rooms.notes: Supports Endurance/Recovery FEATs for healing with rest and nourishment.

rooms.name: Bedrooms (2nd Floor)
rooms.notes: Required for full Health/Karma recovery between adventures.

missions.title: Blackout and Break-In
missions.summary: First team-up. Stopped armed robbery at Castellano's Fine Jewelry during Lower Manhattan blackout.

missions.title: ESU Break-In: Mercs and Masks
missions.summary: Defeated Whiplash, Boomerang, and A.I.M. agents stealing resonance scanners from ESU physics building.

allies.name: Sam Dugan
allies.notes: Former owner of the Silver Star garage
